findings.message: RQ-1 competitor analysis (MyFitnessPal, Cronometer) reflected in product-spec personas and macro target approaches.
findings.evidence: research.md lines 20-64; product-spec.md lines 36-40 (P4 Sam goals/pains)

findings.message: RQ-3 GDPR Article 9 compliance mapped to trainer-client consent gate (US-005) in product-spec.
RQ-5 consumption dependency on 001/003/006 surfaced in product-spec dependency diagram and personas.
product-spec Could Have stories (US-008 dietary filters, US-009 deficiency alerts) originate from research domain brief but are not formalized as FR IDs in spec.md.
Must Have stories US-001..US-002 (core nutrition planning) map to FR-036 and FR-037.
Must Have stories US-003..US-004 (premium trainer-client + recipe swap) map to FR-038 and FR-039.
NO Must Have requirements missing from spec.md.
findings.evidence: 4 Must Have stories exist → 4 explicit FRs (FR-036..FR-039) present in spec.md.

findings.message: NFRs (NFR-001..NFR-004) explicitly present in spec.md and cross-referenced in product-spec README.
Should Have story US-005 (Client Consent Gate) references REQ-008, but spec.md only lists consent as a trailing assumption, not a formal FR.
findings.evidence: spec.md lines 69-71; product-spec.md lines 134-139; verify-report.md W-003

findings.message: FR-036 (create plan with targets) implemented in plan.md §2 Data Model and §3 CRUD API.
FR-037 (link + compliance) implemented in plan.md §4 Compliance Tracking with calculation flow.
FR-038 (trainer-client) implemented in plan.md §5 Trainer-Client Model with sharing flow and privacy rules.
FR-039 (AI recipe swap) referenced in plan.md §8 Implementation Order step 7.
SC-010 (5% accuracy) enforced in compliance calculation with ±5% status thresholds.
All 4 NFRs addressed in plan.md and tasks.md.
findings.evidence: NFR-001 (strict TS) in tasks.md line 125; NFR-002 (JSDoc) tasks.md line 123; NFR-003 (accessible names) tasks.md line 322; NFR-004 (not color-only) tasks.md line 235

findings.message: Dependency table in spec.md matches plan.md architecture context.
findings.evidence: spec.md lines 8-16; plan.md lines 26-34 (GDPR Article 9 compliance)

findings.message: Plan.md open questions (activity granularity, goal presets, consent checkbox) are not directly captured as tasks but implicitly addressed through task acceptance criteria.
findings.evidence: plan.md lines 268-273; tasks.md T-003/T-014 acceptance criteria

findings.message: All 4 plan.md data model tables have corresponding migration/task T-001.
Each plan.md API endpoint exists as a task (T-004, T-005, T-007, T-009).
Compliance calculation logic in plan.md §4 is decomposed into T-006 and T-007.
Task dependency graph reflects plan.md §8 implementation order.
All 17 tasks cover plan.md phases: DB (2), Services (5), Trainer (2), Frontend (3), AI (1), Cross-cut (4).
L5 intentionally skipped per instructions.
No implementation files exist under packages/apps/commise/{web,mobile}/ for this feature.
findings.evidence: find packages/apps/commise -type f -name '*nutrition*' returned no results

findings.message: All task-referenced src/ paths are planning targets, unimplemented in repository.
findings.evidence: tasks.md references src/nutrition/*, src/web/nutrition/*, src/db/*; verify-report.md line 72

findings.message: .forge-status.yml confirm implement state = not-started.
findings.evidence: .forge-status.yml lines 68-70: implement not-started, tasks.md present but no T-IDs marked complete.

findings.message: V-Model requirements.md REQ-001..REQ-020 align with spec.md FR-036..FR-039.
findings.evidence: v-model/requirements.md lines 18-19 (REQ-001 → FR-036); acceptance-plan.md lines 14-21 (AC-001..AC-010 traceability)

findings.message: System design components (SYS-001..SYS-005) map back to REQ IDs and FR IDs.
Dependency specs (006, 003, 001, 002) are all marked Required in spec.md and reflected in plan.md.
Task file paths use generic src/ prefix not explicit packages/apps/commise/{web,mobile}/ monorepo locations. Flagged as INFO per monorepo guidance.
findings.evidence: AGENTS.md lists packages/apps/commise/{web,mobile}/; tasks.md lines 327-330 (src/web), lines 354-356 (src/web)

findings.message: verify-report.md prior run (2026-05-12) was PASS with 0 CRITICAL / 3 WARNING. No new artifacts since then.
